title: Billing Plan Limits
description: Public per-plan resource limits returned by billing plan and enforcement-control endpoints. -1 means unlimited.

trials.description: DEPRECATED alias for optimization_trials. Retained for backward compatibility during the migration to the two-dimensional optimization meter; producers SHOULD also emit optimization_trials.

optimization_trials.description: Max optimization sessions (one trial = one optimization session) per billing period. -1 means unlimited.

optimization_samples.description: Max evaluated samples (examples) across all optimization sessions per billing period. A new run is admitted only if both optimization_trials and optimization_samples have headroom. -1 means unlimited.
